name: Tom Perez
subject: Stop Trump from sabotaging Obamacare (add your name)
body:
Stand with Democrats to protect affordable health care.
---
**Donald Trump is trying to sabotage our health care. Add your name to tell Trump to leave our health care alone:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd")**

Derek --

When the GOP's repeal bill failed in the Senate last month, it was a pretty good day. Together, we sent a clear message that it was time for Republicans to move on from repeal and get to work on real solutions that will help American families.

Apparently, word never reached the Oval Office. Because now that repeal has failed, Trump is threatening to switch to plan B: deliberately undermine Obamacare.

**[Donald Trump is playing a dangerous game with millions of Americans' lives and livelihoods. Join Democrats right now and tell Trump to stop trying to sabotage the Affordable Care Act.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Donald+Trump+is+playing+a+dangerous+game&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd")**

Trump has suggested that he might simply refuse to pay the Affordable Care Act's subsidies that help with out-of-pocket costs. Without them, premiums could skyrocket and insurers could be forced out of the market altogether, leaving countless Americans without access to affordable care.

No matter how much Trump tweets it, Obamacare isn't imploding -- unless Trump goes through with his plan to destroy it. And if he does, the consequences will be dire.

**It's up to us to make sure that never happens. Add your name and say you'll stand with Democrats to stop Donald Trump's plans to sabotage our health care:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-Health-Care-Sabotage1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd")**
Thanks so much,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230d5/4067b0a/33c311e9c/7e6c988a/2656306176/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230d5/4067b0a/33c311e9c/7e6c988b/2656306176/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230d5/4067b0a/33c311e9c/7e6c9888/2656306176/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405230d5/4067b0a/33c311e9c/7e6c9889/2656306176/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170807_tp_nd&source=em_20170807_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Add your name to tell Trump to leave our health care alone: "" Derek -- When the GOP's repeal bill failed in the Senate last month, it was a pretty good day. Together, we sent a clear message that it was time for Republicans to move on from repeal and get to work on real solutions that will help American families. Apparently, word never reached the Oval Office. Because now that repeal has failed, Trump is threatening to switch to plan B: deliberately undermine Obamacare. "" Trump has suggested that he might simply refuse to pay the Affordable Care Act's subsidies that help with out-of-pocket costs. Without them, premiums could skyrocket and insurers could be forced out of the market altogether, leaving countless Americans without access to affordable care. It's up to us to make sure that never happens. Add your name and say you'll stand with Democrats to stop Donald Trump's plans to sabotage our health care: "" Thanks so much, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: Meet 5 women fighting the Trump agenda in their communities >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c4/851264459/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact")
---

Peter,

The resistance is local, and it's running for office.

Since Election Day, we've already put our support behind more than a dozen women at the state and local level who will be strong, progressive voices for their communities.

They're running for positions that may seem small but that have a huge impact on everything from clean water to keeping community health clinics open.

These are also races where a little money can go a LONG way -- which means, together, we have a big impact.

**[Donate $3 to help EMILY's List candidates win at the state and local level.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c5/851264459/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170807_email_LocalEndos?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+EMILYs+List+candidates+&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact")**

Four of our women -- Cindy Friedman (MA-SD Fourth Middlesex District), Stephanie Hansen (DE-SD10), Jennifer McClellan (VA-SD09), and Christine Pellegrino (NY-HD09) -- have already won their elections with the help of this community, most of them in landslides.

In addition to a number of women we're supporting in Virginia, we're focusing on these women who are running strong campaigns:
**Manka Dhingra (WA-SD45)** is running in the most expensive legislative contest in Washington state history -- Republicans, largely funded by Big Oil, have spent more than $1 million against her. That's because if she wins, she could flip control of the state Senate (the only Republican-held legislative chamber on the West Coast) from red to blue. She had a successful primary election this past Tuesday and is strongly positioned for the general election this November.

**Sara Cambensy (MI-HD109)** , currently a Marquette city commissioner, is running in Michigan's Upper Peninsula with a keen eye to energy issues and preserving blue-collar jobs. Her primary is tomorrow!

**Joyce Craig (Manchester Mayor)** was born and raised in Manchester, NH. She's a former school board member and alderman, where she oversaw the city's budgets. As the mother of three children, she's running to protect the quality of education in her community's public schools.

**Laura Curran (Nassau County Executive)** is running in a New York county where two executives are being investigated for corruption. Laura -- a former reporter -- is the right candidate to bring transparency and accountability back to her community.

**Michela Skelton (MO-HD50)** has served as an attorney for the Missouri Senate, where she drafted dozens of bills for senators on both sides of the aisle. Her special election is TOMORROW, so today is our last chance to show we're standing with her.
All of these women are phenomenal candidates who will fight tooth and nail against the Republican agenda trickling from the national level into their local communities.

**Donate $3 to support our candidates running at the state and local level:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Help-Local-Candidates-Win](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c6/851264459/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170807_email_LocalEndos?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHelpLocalCandida&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

P.S. These women are the first of many more we hope to endorse this cycle. **[Help make sure they have what they need to run strong campaigns: Donate $3 today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c7/851264459/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170807_email_LocalEndos?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+Help+make+sure+they+have+what+they+need+&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact")**

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c0/851264459/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170807_email_LocalEndos?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---

1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c2/851264459/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c65bb/24c69fd9/b65936b3/189881c3/851264459/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact&source=WQEFE816N_digital_email_20170807_LocalEndos_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**WANTS TO PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY:** **[UNCONFIRMED](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fded7/2a380d31/1e800eff/fe5bc5/3798903599/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/dontcutsocialsecurity/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F20170802_socialsecurity")**

House Republicans are pushing a budget that could cut $500 billion from programs like Social Security and Medicare - programs that lower-income, older Americans and those living with disabilities depend on to retire with dignity.
Make no mistake: this is a craven attempt by Donald Trump and Paul Ryan to hand tax breaks to their wealthy backers at the expense of hard-working families.
Democrats can stop this budget from passing, but only if we all make our voices heard.
[**Please, sign your name now to tell Washington Republicans NOT to cut vital programs like Social Security and Medicare.**](https://hassan.bsd.net/page/m/f7fded7/2a380d31/1e800eff/fe5bc5/3798903599/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/dontcutsocialsecurity/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F20170802_socialsecurity")
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Statement on dismissed ACLU Lawsuit
body:
PRESS RELEASE

For Immediate Release: August 7, 2017

Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310

Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on dismissed ACLU
Lawsuit

Concord, NH – NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the
following statement regarding the ACLU lawsuit dismissal:

"The dismissal of the ACLU lawsuit represents the conclusion of
an ill-advised move led by the New Hampshire ACLU and the New
Hampshire Democratic Party that was nothing more than a waste of
taxpayer dollars. Republican Governor Chris Sununu and Democratic
Secretary of State Bill Gardner have been fully vindicated. All
parties now acknowledge that the voter checklists are public
information and must be turned over under New Hampshire’s
Right-to-Know law. This conclusion should have come from the
beginning if they had read our laws more carefully."

"Ensuring our elections are conducted with the utmost integrity
is something that Republicans and Democrats should agree on. This
whole episode has been an unfortunate step in a series of moves
to obstruct progress. Republicans and Democrats need to work
together to increase integrity in our elections."

###

clean_body: PRESS RELEASE For Immediate Release: August 7, 2017 Contact: Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310 Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on dismissed ACLU Lawsuit Concord, NH – NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement regarding the ACLU lawsuit dismissal: "The dismissal of the ACLU lawsuit represents the conclusion of an ill-advised move led by the New Hampshire ACLU and the New Hampshire Democratic Party that was nothing more than a waste of taxpayer dollars. Republican Governor Chris Sununu and Democratic Secretary of State Bill Gardner have been fully vindicated. All parties now acknowledge that the voter checklists are public information and must be turned over under New Hampshire’s Right-to-Know law. This conclusion should have come from the beginning if they had read our laws more carefully." "Ensuring our elections are conducted with the utmost integrity is something that Republicans and Democrats should agree on. This whole episode has been an unfortunate step in a series of moves to obstruct progress. Republicans and Democrats need to work together to increase integrity in our elections."
